calendar.matters:
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Merlin, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court advises Mr. Merlin that it appears to the court that his intention with this petition is for an order to help with changing his wife's surname. Mr. Merlin confirms. The court advises that it doesn't believe that the order will serve as intended but that it is inclined to grant the petition. Mr. Merlin offers additional information and advocacy and requests that the court grant his petition, regardless. The court confirms with Mr. Merlin that the time of marriage as 4:00 pm.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Rice. Not Reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2022 Continued To Nov-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
